name: Citi® Diamond Preferred® Card

welcome_offer.description: No welcome offer (focused on 0% intro APR)

earning_rates.notes: No rewards; this is a 0% intro APR card

other_benefits.name: 0% Intro APR on Balance Transfers
other_benefits.description: 0% intro APR for 21 months on balance transfers (from date of account opening)

other_benefits.name: 0% Intro APR on Purchases
other_benefits.description: 0% intro APR for 12 months on purchases

other_benefits.name: Citi Entertainment
other_benefits.description: Special access to purchase tickets for concerts, sporting events, dining experiences

other_benefits.name: Choose Your Due Date
other_benefits.description: Pay on any available date in the beginning, middle or end of the month

notes: Balance transfer fee: 5% or $5 (whichever is greater) during intro period. Variable APR 16.49%-28.99% after intro. Designed for debt consolidation.
